UnusedPrivateProperty:ReverbVisualizerView.kt$ReverbVisualizerView$// Dashed variant used when the cluster has collapsed (Early Refl // slider at its minimum). The dashes communicate "this region // exists but has no width yet." private val earlyBarDashedPaint = Paint(Paint.ANTI_ALIAS_FLAG).apply { style = Paint.Style.STROKE strokeCap = Paint.Cap.BUTT strokeWidth = 2.0f * density color = earlyBarColor pathEffect = android.graphics.DashPathEffect( floatArrayOf(3f * density, 3f * density), 0f ) }

UnusedPrivateProperty:ReverbVisualizerView.kt$ReverbVisualizerView$private val arrowPaint = Paint(Paint.ANTI_ALIAS_FLAG).apply { color = 0xFFAAAAAA.toInt() strokeWidth = 1.2f * density style = Paint.Style.STROKE }

UnusedPrivateProperty:ReverbVisualizerView.kt$ReverbVisualizerView$private val directBarPaint = Paint(Paint.ANTI_ALIAS_FLAG).apply { style = Paint.Style.STROKE strokeCap = Paint.Cap.ROUND strokeWidth = 4f * density color = directBarColor }

UnusedPrivateProperty:ReverbVisualizerView.kt$ReverbVisualizerView$private val frameLinePaint = Paint(Paint.ANTI_ALIAS_FLAG).apply { color = 0xFFAAAAAA.toInt() strokeWidth = 1.5f * density style = Paint.Style.STROKE strokeCap = Paint.Cap.ROUND }

UnusedPrivateProperty:ReverbVisualizerView.kt$ReverbVisualizerView$private val handleFillActivePaint = Paint(Paint.ANTI_ALIAS_FLAG).apply { style = Paint.Style.STROKE color = 0xFFFFD54F.toInt() strokeWidth = 2.5f }

UnusedPrivateProperty:ReverbVisualizerView.kt$ReverbVisualizerView$private val tailBarPaint = Paint(Paint.ANTI_ALIAS_FLAG).apply { style = Paint.Style.STROKE strokeCap = Paint.Cap.ROUND strokeWidth = 1.3f * density color = tailBarColor }

UnusedPrivateProperty:TargetCurveActivity.kt$TargetCurveActivity$val messageTv = android.widget.TextView(this).apply { text = getString(R.string.dialog_add_to_autoeq) setTextColor(0xFFAAAAAA.toInt()); textSize = 14f setPadding(0, 0, 0, (12 * density).toInt()) }
VariableNaming:BiquadFilter.kt$BiquadFilter$val B2 = (R1 - R2 * phi1 - B0) / (4.0 * phi1 * phi1)
VariableNaming:BiquadFilter.kt$BiquadFilter$val R1 = (A0 * phi0 + A1 * phi1 + A2 * phi2) * G * G
VariableNaming:BiquadFilter.kt$BiquadFilter$val R2 = (-A0 + A1 + 4.0 * (phi0 - phi1) * A2) * G * G
VariableNaming:SimpleEqBarsView.kt$SimpleEqBarsView$private val POP_SCALE = 1.1f // active bar is 10% bigger
